title: GBM Probe JRN Estimation on rel-stack: Cross-Validated Aggregation Sensitivity and Multiplicative Compounding
summary: Demo notebook analyzing Join Reproduction Number (JRN) estimation using LightGBM probes across 11 foreign-key joins in the StackOverflow-based rel-stack relational benchmark. Covers JRN matrix visualization, probe-to-full Spearman ρ correlation, aggregation sensitivity analysis with quadratic fitting, and multiplicative compounding of multi-hop chain JRN. Mini data contains pre-computed JRN results for 3 entity-level tasks and 5 aggregation strategies.
